perTest.details: Live SANDBOX read smoke for the three new read-only methods on Users (list_users, search_users, get_user_personal_data). pytest reported 1 passed in 1.02s; all three pass-criteria asserts succeeded — list_users(limit=5) returned a non-empty List[Dict], search_users(q='primary_id~<supplied test user>', limit=5) echoed back the supplied user, and get_user_personal_data(<supplied test user>) returned a non-empty dict. No state mutated; cleanup not applicable.

Pure runtime input-validation guard exercise — no HTTP issued. pytest reported 1 passed in 0.06s; all eight pass-criteria asserts succeeded — search_users('') / search_users('   ') / search_users(None) / search_users(123) and get_user_personal_data('') / get_user_personal_data('   ') / get_user_personal_data(None) / get_user_personal_data(123) each raised AlmaValidationError before any outbound request. No state read or mutated; cleanup not applicable.
